marketGuide:
Pre-Market Buying Guide — Spring/Summer 2026

Based on 14 months of Lordon sales data (Jan 2025 – Mar 2026) across three locations (Saint John, Moncton, Halifax).
Comparison: First 6 weeks of SS26 vs first 6 weeks of SS25 (actual vs actual — no projections).

📊 SEASON SNAPSHOT
• SS 2025 Full Season Revenue: $835,349
• SS 2025 First 6 Weeks: $120,809
• SS 2026 First 6 Weeks: $113,228 (-6% vs same period last year)

🟢 GROW — Categories pacing ahead of SS25
• TOP
• DENIM
• JEWELRY
• JACKET

🔴 REDUCE — Categories trending behind
• SWEATER
• PANT
• ACCESSORIES

💰 OPEN-TO-BUY — Where to spend at market
• DENIM
• JACKET
• UNKNOWN
• VEST

⚠️ OVERSTOCKED — Avoid new orders
• JEWELRY
• SKIRT
• CARDIGAN
• SHORT

🏷️ TOP BRANDS — Pacing ahead of SS25
• ICHI
• DAZE
• PILGRIM
• Z SUPPLY
• SAINT TROPEZ

📋 BUYING PRIORITIES
1. Focus open-to-buy dollars on proven categories with strong SS26 pacing
2. Hold new inventory in overstocked categories — clear current stock first  
3. Target 8–10 weeks of supply at market entry for new orders
4. Brands pacing ahead should get 10–15% larger commitments vs SS25

Generated: 2026-03-14 | Data covers SS25 (Feb–Jul 2025), FW25 (Aug 2025–Jan 2026), SS26 to date
